title: agropyron richardsonii var. vulpinum
intro: Agropyron richardsonii var. vulpinum, also known as prairie junegrass or wolf junegrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. The herbal preparations of Agropyron richardsonii var. vulpinum typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
